results.name: squee's toy
results.description: The little ball-shaped dude Squee carries with him. The name is a pun!

results.name: stalactite
results.description: The downward rock formation found in caves

results.name: stalagmite
results.description: The upward rock formation found in caves

results.name: stalking
results.description: The "can't be blocked by more than one creature" ability, [as named by the designers](http://markrosewater.tumblr.com/post/178266363158). See also [gives stalking](gives-stalking).

results.name: standard
results.description: A type of flag or banner that has a symbol that represents or identifiies an individual, unit, or organization. Symbols include, but are not limited to personal emblems, coat of arms, military rank or unit identifiers, national flags, and religious insignia.

results.name: staple with set's mechanic
results.description: A common card design that is related to one or more of the main mechanics in a set

results.name: star arch
results.description: Stone arches found throughout Arcavios.

results.name: starburst foil
results.description: A distinctive foiling pattern used for a short while in the Junior Tournament Series from 2005–2008 inclusive and then never again.

results.name: starling (marvel)
results.description: Superhero alter ego of [Tiana Toomes](tiana-toomes).

results.name: starnheim
results.description: One of the ten realms of Kaldheim, land of valkyries.

results.name: starting player matters
results.description: Cards that care about or interact with who is the starting player.

results.name: start of game
results.description: Cards that are particularly effective when you start the game with them.

results.name: star trail
results.description: Stars depicted as a lines of light that track their (usually circular) motion through the sky over time.

results.name: star wars
results.description: Things with a Star Wars aesthetic, just for fun.

results.name: state trigger
results.description: Cards that use a state trigger, which is a particular and rare kind of trigger. A common one is "When you control no [X]s, sacrifice this creature".

results.name: static effect in graveyard
results.description: Cards with static effects that work from inside the graveyard.

results.name: statue
results.description: A sculpted figure.

results.name: statuette
results.description: Like a statue, but small.

results.name: steam
results.description: Hot water vapor, typically produced by heating liquid to a boil. See also [mist](mist).

results.name: steve rogers
results.description: From Marvel Comics, the original [Captain America](captain-america).
